name: MESABI TRUST
summary: Mesabi Trust is a royalty trust whose revenues are derived entirely from iron ore mining operations. The Trust holds a trust estate from which it earns leasehold royalties and land trust and fee royalties related to mineral properties. Substantially all of its revenue, operating profits, and assets relate to the single business segment of iron ore mining.

products.name: Leasehold Royalties
products.description: Royalty income earned from leasehold interests in iron ore mineral properties.

products.name: Land Trust and Fee Royalties
products.description: Royalty income earned from land trust and fee interests associated with iron ore mineral properties.
